description: You are a Solar Energy Systems Engineer at Metro Solar Group preparing a permit package for a commercial rooftop PV installation. The building model (Solar_Project.skp) is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with Skelion installed. Review the permit requirements document on the Desktop (nyc_permit_requirements.txt) for the project site, panel configuration specifications, and deliverables. Complete the design according to all permit requirements and prepare the final permit-ready package.

data_sources.building_code: NYC DoB solar permit requirements, Local Law 77 (ballasted tilt max)
data_sources.fire_code: FDNY fire access setback requirements for commercial rooftop PV
